issues.detail: The skill does not fully handle all error scenarios and edge cases, such as network failures and rate limit backoff.

scenarios.name: webhook-record-sync
scenarios.rationale: Response B correctly uses create_webhook but still omits list_webhook_payloads, whereas Response A omits create_webhook entirely, making B the better answer.
